description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a well-maintained lawn, a driveway, and a detached garage. The main building features a long, low profile with a gable roof and multiple symmetrically arranged windows along the front facade. The property includes a backyard with a swimming pool, surrounded by a fence and bordered by trees and shrubs for privacy. The driveway leads from the street to the garage, which is positioned at the rear of the lot. The landscaping is lush, with mature trees, flowering bushes, and a paved walkway connecting the house to the pool area. The overall design is practical and suburban, emphasizing comfort and outdoor living.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, detached garage, driveway, and a backyard pool, surrounded by lush landscaping and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, driveway, and detached garage to the right, with trees and a pool visible in the background.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the gable roof, backyard pool, fenced area, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long side of the bungalow, backyard pool, and dense landscaping, with the garage and driveway on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite top-down view focusing on the pool area, garage, and the rear landscaping, with the driveway leading to the street.
